creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Zhenlei Huang from comment #30)
We're pretty late in the cycle for more patches, but it's sufficiently small and self-contained that we might be able to persuade re@ to take it.

We do need to get it into stable/12 (and 13) asap so we can ask.

Did you want to prepare the MFC, or should I do them to get them in asap?
